content: Hi, I'm having trouble with the checkout process. The payment button doesn't seem to work.
I'm sorry to hear you're experiencing issues with checkout. Can you tell me what happens when you click the payment button? Does it show any error message?
Nothing happens at all. I click it and it just stays on the same page. I'm using Chrome on Mac.

Thank you for those details. This sounds like it could be a JavaScript error. Could you try opening your browser's developer console (Cmd+Option+J) and see if there are any red error messages when you click the button?
Yes! It says 'Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property submit of undefined'

That's very helpful! This confirms there's a bug in our checkout form. I've logged this issue and our engineering team will investigate. In the meantime, could you try using Safari or Firefox? The issue might be browser-specific.
